title: Traveled Tracks
body:
# Traveled Tracks

Adds compatibility between Trackwork and The Roads More Traveled (TRMT)

TRMT is a fabric only mod, however it works through connector. Traveled Tracks is a forge mod, designed to be used with:
- Trackwork 1.2.0+
- TRMT latest
- Sintra connector + Forgified fabric api

Traveled Tracks makes trackwork wheels and tracks affect the terrain in the same way a player or mounted player would in TRMT.

Wheels will use the unmounted player modifier, tracks will use the mounted player modifier (aka tracks are "heavier", like riding a horse, and more likely to degrade the ground)

Default config for TRMT makes it so a player (or, in this case, trackwork vehicle) has to travel the same route many times to noticeably change the terrain. So this mod is best in the long-run, to see your "desire roads" for your vehicles! 

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/Y7IKMe_Cxwg" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
